title: More Tools++ by Anoosh
description: More Tools++ by Anoosh adds over a dozen new sets of tools to the game, crafted from a variety of materials like apples, dirt, obsidian, and even enchanted golden apples. Expand your crafting and survival possibilities with these fun and unique tools.
body:
More Tools++ By Anoosh
Welcome to More Tools++, a mod that I, Anoosh, created to expand the variety of tools available in Minecraft. This mod introduces new tool sets crafted from a wide range of materials, from common resources like dirt and leaves to more unique items such as eggs and blaze rods. My goal was to add more creative and fun options for players to explore in their survival worlds. I hope these new tools make your Minecraft journey more exciting!

What's Included:
Apple Tools: A set of basic tools made from apples. They're a great early-game option, especially if you have a surplus of apples.

![ش](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83f25aded24b79d01d735829f0c5bd2494c32aeb.png)

Beef Tools: Crafted from raw beef, these tools offer a bit more durability than wood, making them a good option for players who are just starting out.

![ذ1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4661d85817da0ecdabe7c46447cfaf4b80eed7d.png)

Blaze Tools: These fiery tools are crafted from blaze rods. They have a high durability and are a great choice for players who have explored the Nether.

![ذ2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/141b875dc7e52083dcd37f0c612f161e5894b779.png)

Bone Tools: A simple set of tools made from bones. They're slightly more durable than wooden tools and are useful if you have a lot of bones from skeletons.

![b3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfced2a2bbe6616a858f6532020fc9138ba33e81.png)

Carrot Tools: A unique and easy-to-craft set of tools made from carrots. They provide a fun alternative for early-game use.

![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb501df8bd1bdd8d45aa0c9e6a991aa6966452cf.png)

Dirt Tools: The weakest tools in the mod, crafted from dirt. They're a simple, last-resort option or a fun novelty item.

![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff89a1f6e5092a28fb1d47ba65a323edb1b14300.png)

Egg Tools: Yes, you can craft tools from eggs! These tools are a bit fragile but can be a useful, quirky option for a new world.

![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e79e87c9ec94c0cb804eea26d88345e528a4f41.png)

Enchanted Golden Apple Tools: The ultimate tool set in this mod. Crafted from enchanted golden apples, they have very high durability and powerful enchantments already applied.

![e2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39092ee1b4539f4deb33148e7ec75b55953c1bc8.png)

Ender Pearl Tools: These tools are made from ender pearls. They're fast and durable, providing a new way to use your ender pearls.

![e3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2b7f56a480673a0f3c409d88fd0ae4338e5550f.png)

Golden Apple Tools: A strong set of tools crafted from golden apples. They are a powerful choice for players looking for an upgrade without using diamonds.

![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0def6cdde5b02a8acb10d6ccee0037bcfc2c8236.png)

Leaf Tools: A simple set of tools made from leaves. They are similar in strength to dirt tools and are great for using up excess leaves.

![l](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b7e123b4c0d27d8b022761ef367140cbf189236.png)

Magma Tools: Tools crafted from magma blocks. They are very durable and have a unique, fiery appearance. A perfect option for those who spend time in the Nether.

![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ffac923be13d44d25906f6128eb9cf28c7cb8cc.png)

Obsidian Tools: As strong as diamond tools but with even more durability, obsidian tools are a great endgame option. They are a bit slow, but they last a very long time.

![o](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92a19653e8e3ae7e089f00602c5c6a34d844f724.png)

Sand Tools: A weak but very accessible set of tools. They are a fun way to use up a lot of sand if you have it.

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55f9a49b8bce551095467cc32956948b2c64f242.png)

Sapling Tools: Tools made from saplings. They are similar in strength to wooden tools and can be a good option for early-game crafting.

![s2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/127981844db129cb64ac4d418e8f943bf2afd99a.png)

Slime Tools: Crafted from slime balls, these tools have a bouncy feel and offer a good balance of speed and durability.

![s3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8929d5954dc000b9db4e38e8053e4e40d74bd36.png)

Stick Tools: A simple novelty tool set made from sticks. They are very weak but can be crafted with minimal resources.

![s4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91767845d3585e7204649c2d690ef73c9939e03f.png)

String Tools: A set of tools made from string. They are extremely fast but have very low durability. Great for quickly breaking blocks.

![s6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58aa80f58cdbc68317e75f1cf277682cc00fc48e.png)

Sugar Tools: Tools crafted from sugar. They are a fast and simple option for early-game use, though not very durable.

![s7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dadc9ccdd0892460f59dab8922356e5d28e5ee0.png)

Water Tools: A unique tool set made from water. While they're not the strongest, they add a fun and creative element to the game.

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c0dd77d97652f9c0e3117dd12a1ea36c9af1696.png)

I'm always looking for feedback and new ideas. Feel free to leave a comment with your suggestions!
